name: Ginger-Scallion Barbecue Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Light Brown Sugar, lightly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine all ingredients except scallions.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 to 40 minutes or until the sauce has reduced in volume by about one-half.
4. The sauce should be thick enough to coat the back of a spoon.
5. Remove from heat, let cool for a few minutes, then stir in scallions.
6. Serve with baby-back ribs.
Makes about 1¼ cups sauce.
